title: Luminous Power Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Luminous Power Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Luminous Power Technologies in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Luminous Power Technologies:
Luminous Power Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies!
